_note: YPDS Jakarta 2026 Summit Rundown. Updates as agenda is finalized.

items.title: Welcome & Opening Remarks
items.description: Opening ceremony with keynote speeches by diplomatic leaders, setting the vision for YPDS Jakarta 2026.

items.title: Public Diplomacy in the 21st Century
items.description: Interactive session exploring how young leaders can leverage public diplomacy to foster cross-cultural understanding and influence international affairs.

items.title: Lunch & Networking
items.description: Authentic Indonesian culinary experience with delegates from diverse regions.

items.title: Asia and the Mediterranean: Regional Strategies
items.description: Strategic perspectives on regional cooperation, security, and economic opportunities across Asia and the Mediterranean.

items.title: Peace by Peaceful Means
items.description: Exploring youth roles in conflict resolution, peace-building, and diplomatic negotiations in a multipolar world.

items.title: Strategic Communication
items.description: Techniques for effective advocacy, media engagement, and narrative-building in modern diplomacy.

items.title: Grand Strategy vs Economic Strategy
items.description: Youth-led debate on balancing national interests, regional cooperation, and global economic challenges.

items.title: Dinner Reception at Tugu Kunstkring Paleis
items.description: Evening gathering at Jakarta's historic Kunstkring Paleis for networking, authentic cuisine, and cultural immersion.

items.title: Presentation of Policy Recommendations
items.description: Youth teams present their policy innovations to the YPDS steering committee and diplomatic advisors.

items.title: Closing Ceremony & Awards
items.description: Celebrating emerging leaders, announcing next steps, and vision for continued engagement.

items.title: Farewell Networking
items.description: Final gathering before departure. Connect with peers and mentors.
